name: Nevada Gambrel Garage Plan - 24x24 Barn-Style Garage with Loft Potential | DIY Workshop & Storage Building Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a high-capacity roof profile that increases vertical interior space and creates a striking exterior appearance.
The 24x24 footprint provides plenty of room for two vehicles, ATVs, lawn equipment, tools, and workshop areas.
The gambrel roof naturally creates overhead space ideal for a large storage loft, seasonal storage, or workshop mezzanine.
Clean framing techniques and logical dimensions make Nevada a manageable project for experienced DIY builders or contractors.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Nevada Gambrel Garage - a spacious 24x24 barn-style garage and workshop building designed for efficiency, durability, and timeless architectural appeal. Featuring the classic gambrel roof profile, Nevada maximizes interior headroom while delivering the distinctive charm of a traditional barn-style structure. With its balanced footprint, loft-ready design, and DIY-friendly construction, this garage combines practical functionality with bold curb ap...
